summary: Social AI chat app where people and bots share group conversations.
editor_note: Most AI companion apps trap users in one-on-one confession booths; this points the format back toward messy group chat. The public surface shows 300+ models, message counts like 86.8K on individual characters, and mobile app links instead of a blank waitlist. That choice makes AI feel closer to Discord roleplay than a therapist clone. The hard part is moderation: social AI gets more interesting exactly where it gets harder to keep safe.
investors: Lightspeed Venture Partners, Betaworks, Hartbeat Ventures, The Games Fund
